content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.03%, Bank Nifty -1%, VIX +8.55% to 18.28 — broader tape risk-off with sharp rotation into defensives (Pharma +0.6%, FMCG via TATACONSUM/MARICO/DABUR, Healthcare via APOLLOHOSP/LAURUSLABS). My book is well-aligned with the defensive theme; many positions are running into resistance with stretched intraday moves. Priority is locking in gains on the winners via SL trail rather than chasing fresh entries into a -1% tape with VIX spiking.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.3%, CMP 123.51 vs SL 121.00 (-2% room). Gold consolidating; geopolitical premium and Fed cut path supportive. SL intact, no change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +3.3% at 847, broke 52w high after Q4 beat (PAT +18%, vol growth 9%). Tighten SL from 838 (already above entry) to 832 — still 1.8% below CMP (clears 1% trail-gap floor), locks in ~+1.5% min profit. MOFSL TP 950 supports holding to target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +9.7% at 1380, post-Q4 surge +7.4% today. Current SL 1365 already at +8.4% lock-in (1.1% below CMP, meets trail-gap floor). No-op: SL stays at 1365 — already breakeven-plus. Actually this is a no-op; emit HOLD instead.",
      "new_stop_loss_explanation": "no-op skip"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.1% at 2817, broke above 20-DMA cleanly. SL 2740 is -2.7% below CMP, valid risk budget. Below 2% threshold for breakeven move; let setup develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.2% at 9096, near 52w high with 3.3x volume. SL 8950 is -1.6% — tight enough; gain too modest for breakeven trail yet. Capital Goods strength supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.4% at 10602. SL 10440 is -1.5% below CMP. Buyback at 12000 record date May 29 is a structural floor catalyst — let position run to SL or recovery. Auto -1.24% today is broad sector weakness, not name-specific."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.5% at 479 with SL 470 (-1.9%). Q4 was strong (PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance raised). Intraday tape wobble — SL was sized for this noise. Respect SL placement (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +3.9% at 1274, broke 52w high. SL already at 1255 = +2.4% lock-in (1.5% below CMP, meets trail-gap). No-op tighten needed beyond current — emit HOLD via position_actions; this MODIFY block is no-op so converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.4% at 1265 after broad +9.55% breakout on Q4 (UVG 16%). SL 1198 is -5.3% below CMP — wider than ideal but the entry was recent and the breakout is genuine. Gain not yet at 2% threshold for breakeven trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.5% at 861 with SL 850 (-1.3%). 3.2x volume accumulation, near 52w high. Order book +61% YoY. SL tight and sized for noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held flat at 8092 near 52w high. HSBC upgrade to TP 9000. Q4 results May 20 — within 3-session binary window getting closer but not yet (8 sessions away). SL 7950 = -1.8% below CMP, appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.1% at 1872 near 52w high. SL 1830 = -2.2%. Q4 results May 21 — outside 3-session window. Organon deal adds leverage overhang. Hold to SL or trail later."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.0% at 1648 with SL 1610 (-2.3%). Research note flagged BEARISH modifier -0.10 (Tata 1mg B2C launch, ICICI cut target to 1460, margin compression). Thesis weakening but not yet broken; SL placement adequate. Watch closely — if breaks 1640 intraday support, reconsider."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.1% at 4534 — gave back from intraday high 4555. Q4 results May 21 (outside 3-session window). SL 4360 = -3.8%. Breakout intact; let it develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending MIS BUY @ 133.50 from 7795 minutes ago (5+ days stale). MIS pending orders should never carry; cancel to clear book hygiene."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 121 intact, normal consolidation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail from 838 to 832 — wait, 832 is BELOW current SL 838. Cannot loosen. Keep at 838 (1.1% below CMP). Actually SL 838 is at +2.2% from entry 820 and only 1.06% below CMP 847 — meets 1% trail-gap floor. HOLD existing SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1365 at +8.4% lock-in already; 1.1% below CMP 1380 — at trail-gap floor. Don't tighten further to avoid self-stopout on normal noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gain only 1.1%, below 2% breakeven-trail threshold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gain only 0.2%, SL already tight at -1.6%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position in slight loss, SL at -1.5%, buyback floor at 12000 record May 29."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 thesis intact, SL at -1.9% appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1255 already locked in +2.4% gain, 1.5% below CMP — at trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gain 1.4%, just below 2% breakeven-trail threshold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 850 already tight at -1.3%, near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL -1.8% adequate; will reassess as May 20 results approach (3-session window)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL -2.2%, Q4 May 21 outside binary window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish modifier from research — Tata 1mg disruption, ICICI cut TP. Position is small (5 shares ~₹8.3K, 0.85% of book), holding to SL is acceptable given size."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Breakout intact, Q4 May 21 outside 3-session window for now."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong BULLISH research candidates not admitted today and reasons (per Rule 18): (1) THERMAX +9.06% gap-up: stock already faded from 4880 high to 4561 — gap fill / exhaustion pattern, not clean breakout entry. (2) APOLLOHOSP candidate but already held. (3) BAJAJ-AUTO candidate but already held. (4) DABUR/MARICO/COFORGE all bullish but already held. (5) TATACONSUM has open BUY LIMIT @ 1240 (450m old) — let it expire or wait; not stacking. (6) Deployment already at 55% with 11+ holdings; broader tape -1% with VIX +8.55% is genuine risk-off context for NOT adding fresh longs into closing hour (49 min to close). Today's loss already -₹23K (2.36%) — capital preservation rule applies. Will reassess admit candidates tomorrow on fresh tape. CGPOWER, POLYCAB, COFORGE position management is the right work for this tick.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Cumulative P&L now -2.49%; rolling 5d win rate only 12% with profit factor 0.3x — strategy has been bleeding via too-wide losses vs small wins. Today's positioning across pharma/healthcare/FMCG/capital-goods defensives is well-aligned with the relative-strength rotation. Key risk: BAJAJ-AUTO, DABUR, GOLDBEES all in small drawdown; LALPATHLAB has fresh bearish research overhang. Cancelled stale HFCL MIS pending. No new admits given tape weakness (Nifty -1%, VIX +8.55%) and existing book concentration in defensives. Discipline this week: respect SLs, do NOT panic-close into noise, do NOT churn into closing hour."
}
